Extreme Heat: Install cool roofing and external shading
Tropical Cyclones: Install storm shutters and impact-resistant glazing
Develop and test cyclone emergency response plan
Thunderstorms & Lightning: Install or upgrade lightning protection system
Install surge protection on all critical equipment
Sandstorms / Harmattan: Install HEPA dust filtration on all HVAC intakes
Seal all equipment enclosures to IP54 minimum
Heavy Rainfall: Inspect and upgrade roof drainage capacity
Install waterproof seals on external penetrations
Develop flood response and recovery procedures
River Flooding: Develop flood early warning monitoring system
Flash Flooding: Install enhanced surface drainage and sump pumps
Coastal Flooding: Install temporary or permanent flood barriers
Raise critical equipment above flood line
Develop coastal flood emergency response plan
Storm Surge: Relocate critical systems above surge level
Coastal & Riverbank Erosion: Install revetment or gabion protection works
Groundwater Flooding: Install sump pumps and French drains
Sea Level Rise: Raise foundation levels in new construction
Desertification: Implement dust and air quality monitoring
Establish green buffer zone around facility
Wildfire / Bushfire: Clear vegetation buffer zone around perimeter
Water Scarcity: Conduct water audit and conservation measures
Install water recycling and rainwater harvesting
Tsunamis: Raise critical equipment above inundation level
Glacial Retreat: Diversify water sources away from glacial systems
Include in long-term supply chain review
